index.ts is modified but the guard is unchanged. Let me see what the diff actually contains.
The required fix is absent. Let me confirm no commit contains it.
The required fix is **not implemented**. 

The task's core, explicit change—replacing the message-handler guard at index.ts:739

```ts
if (frame.sessionFile !== args.sessionFile || frame.requestId !== args.requestId) return;
```

with `if (frame.requestId !== args.requestId) return;`—is absent. Line 739 still contains the original guard that compares `frame.sessionFile !== args.sessionFile`, which is precisely the line the task says causes the hang for normalized/non-canonical session paths.

The only changes to `index.ts` are unrelated work (a local/remote race + headless fallback refactor: `hasRendered`, `remoteResultToToolResult`, `DialogResult` undefined handling). None of these touch the sessionFile-vs-requestId correlation bug. The passing command gates are all Foreman test suites, which never exercise this code path—so exit code 0 says nothing about the actual task.

VERDICT: FAIL
